title: The Man from Guntown

actors: Tim McCoy, Billie Seward, Wheeler Oakman
plot: When Tim Hanlon arrives to tell Ruth McArthur her long lost brother has been killed, she mistakes him for her brother. He stays on to help her retain control of the dam her farther started. But DeLong is after the dam and having h...
